serviceNotes.engine oil: OM628 4.0L V8 diesel: flexible ASSYST up to 25,000 km / 12 months; rec 15,000 km severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: V8 diesel intake service per inspection intervals.
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Diesel fuel filter ~60,000 km per ASSYST.
serviceNotes.coolant: Long-life coolant 150,000 km or 5 years, whichever first.

serviceSources.engine oil: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU & ASSYST PLUS — flexible diesel service; maximum indicated Oil Service up to 25,000 km / 12 months (OM628 V8 CDI). Tier 2 https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7633-2006/service (E 320 CDI OM642 proxy) lists 10,000 km — retained 25,000 km as ASSYST maximum ceiling per EU flexible-service rules.
serviceSources.dust filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W211/S211) owner's manual EU — dust/pollen filter 30,000 km / 24 months
serviceSources.engine air filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU — V8 CDI air filter 60,000 km / 48 months (inspection table). https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7633-2006/service lists 10,000 km (likely oil-service-interval misattribution, not air filter specific)
serviceSources.brake fluid: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W211) owner's manual EU — brake fluid renewal every 2 years (DOT 4+)
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Mercedes-Benz W211 EU maintenance booklet — inspect brake lining thickness at regular service intervals (~30,000 km orientation)
serviceSources.fuel filter: Mercedes-Benz W211 OM628 EU service sheet — diesel fuel filter 60,000 km orientation; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7633-2006/service lists 30,000 km for OM642 (discrepancy across database entries)
serviceSources.coolant: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU — long-life coolant 150,000 km / 60 months (5 years), whichever first. https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7633-2006/service lists 90,000 km / 5 years for E 320 CDI (OM642 proxy, may differ for OM628)
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: 722.6 / 722.9 preventive ATF ~60,000 km — Mercedes-Benz workshop / specialist consensus
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil preventive ~60,000 km — specialist consensus
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~120,000 km — specialist preventive
serviceSources.poly-V belt: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7633-2006/service — serpentine belt 90,000 km (E 320 CDI OM642 proxy); file uses 100,000 km preventive rounding for OM628 V8
